question: Will the price of Solana be above $80 on April 19?

fragility_points: Broad crypto selloff before April 19 noon ET.
Any Binance-specific operational or pricing anomaly near settlement.
key_assumptions: Recent low/mid-80s Binance trading is the right near-term reference class.
No major crypto or SOL-specific downside shock pushes the target minute below 80.
Binance API and Binance UI candle data are practically aligned for settlement interpretation.
main_logical_chain: The governing contract asks only whether Binance SOL/USDT closes above 80 at one specific minute on April 19 noon ET.
Current Binance spot and recent Binance closes place SOL in a recent regime mostly above 80.
That makes Yes the base-rate favorite.
But multi-day crypto volatility and single-minute settlement risk make 89% look too high.
Therefore a Yes estimate below market, around 74%, is more defensible.
payload.main_thesis: SOL above $80 on April 19 is more likely than not because Binance spot and recent closes are already mostly above 80, but the market overstates certainty because a 3-day crypto move below the threshold remains plausible.
quote_anchors: Polymarket rule: final Close price higher than 80
payload.source_quality_view: Good enough for a medium-difficulty threshold case: primary exchange data from the settlement source family plus contract/rules and an extra live-price verification pass.
strongest_disconfirmers: A roughly 6% drop in under three days is normal enough in crypto to keep No live.
Recent Binance range data included a daily low around 78.38.
The contract samples one exact minute, not a broader average or same-day high.
strongest_supports: Binance SOLUSDT spot was about 84.94 at research time, already above 80.
Recent Binance daily closes were mostly above 80.
CoinGecko cross-check also placed SOL around 84.9, supporting the mid-80s regime view.
payload.timing_relevance: Resolution is fixed to April 19, 2026 at 12:00 ET on the Binance 1-minute candle close, so current-above-threshold evidence is helpful but not dispositive.
unresolved_ambiguities: Exact intraday volatility distribution for the noon ET minute was not modeled directly.
Minor implementation ambiguity remains because verification used Binance API rather than the exact UI candle render.
payload.what_would_change_view: I would raise the estimate if SOL stayed comfortably above 80 into late April 18/early April 19 with calmer volatility; I would cut it if SOL traded back toward or below 80 or if broader crypto turned risk-off.
